name: lockpaw
title: Lockpaw
description: Control the Lockpaw lock screen for AI agents
author: eriknielsen

commands.name: lock
commands.title: Lock Screen
commands.subtitle: Lockpaw
commands.description: Activate the Lockpaw lock screen overlay

commands.name: unlock
commands.title: Unlock Screen
commands.subtitle: Lockpaw
commands.description: Request unlock of the Lockpaw lock screen (requires authentication)

commands.name: unlock-password
commands.title: Unlock with Password
commands.subtitle: Lockpaw
commands.description: Unlock the Lockpaw lock screen with your Mac password

commands.name: toggle
commands.title: Toggle Lock Screen
commands.subtitle: Lockpaw
commands.description: Toggle the Lockpaw lock screen on/off
